'''jat챦fj챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycosphere|mycosphere]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycosphere|mycosphere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| jat챦fj챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦fth|jat챦fj챦fth]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦fj|jat챦fj챦fj]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦fsh|jat챦fj챦fsh]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f|jat챦fj챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:jat챦ft챦fj챦fth|jat챦ft챦fj챦fth]] || [[word:jat챦ft챦fj챦fj|jat챦ft챦fj챦fj]] || [[word:jat챦ft챦fj챦fsh|jat챦ft챦fj챦fsh]] || [[word:jat챦ft챦fj챦f|jat챦ft챦fj챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦fth|jat챦fj챦fth]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦fj|jat챦fj챦fj]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦fsh|jat챦fj챦fsh]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f|jat챦fj챦f]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f|jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f|jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f|jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f|jat챦fj챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦fn|jat챦fj챦f챦fn]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦fn|jat챦fj챦f챦fn]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦fn|jat챦fj챦f챦fn]] || [[word:jat챦fj챦f챦fn|jat챦fj챦f챦fn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
